caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun and wearing black headphones is seated in a recording studio. She wears a black t-shirt featuring a white circular logo and is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red, while a sign above it says "Employee Only". To her right, a yellow wall is visible, and red and white text on the screen reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". Across the frames, the woman remains in the same position, smiling and looking slightly off-camera, while her facial expression shifts subtly as she listens or prepares to speak. The scene remains static with no movement in the background or changes in the equipment, focusing entirely on the woman's subtle reactions during the recording session.
